title: Madras HC rejects objections to election petition challenging Congress MP Manickam Tagore's 2024 poll win
description: The Madras High Court recently refused to reject an election petition challenging the 2024 Lok Sabha election of Congress MP B Manickam Tagore from the Virudhunagar Parliamentary Constituency [Manickam Tagore Vs Vijay Prabhakaran].Justice N Sathish Kumar held that the allegations raised against Tagore, including those concerning the alleged distribution of Congress Party Guarantee Cards, cash distribution, booth capturing and counting irregularities, raised triable issues.The Court, therefore, d
